findings.title: ACCESS CONTROL leads (privileged fn, no modifier)

findings.title: REENTRANCY (external call then state write)

findings.title: UNCHECKED ERC20 return (silent transfer failure)
findings.note: ERC20 transfer/transferFrom return ignored -> use SafeERC20 (USDT/ZRX return false, not revert)
